text: In the first image, I feel a moment of anticipation as I am about to cross a threshold—glass and light acting as both a barrier and an invitation. In the second image, enveloped by vibrant graphics and experimental technology, I am thrust into a space alive with possibility and curiosity. Here, investigation and imagination are celebrated. I feel part of a living conversation, and the energy of inquiry pulses around me, making me both slightly disoriented and genuinely inspired.
